name: payments
notes: Figma exports: 'Payment - desktop' → variants/desktop-default/; 'Payment - mobile' → variants/mobile-default/. Each variant folder also has default.png next to default.svg.
Mobile stack: Pending (one card, two timed rows + 'Show all' inside), Recurring payments card, Most recent recipients card.
Desktop: pending in main column; recurring + recipients stacked in sidebar column.
Figma Main Content stack gap: mobile space/4 (16dp) → apps/web --space-3; desktop column space/6 (32dp) → --space-5.
Implementation stacks sidebar below pending under 1024px (body[data-screen=payments] flex column + visible .view__sidebar).
